metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2465
metadata.comment:
Rationale: PTPRD interacts with NGL-3 through their first two FNIII domains.

19/2/2018 Pim
- PTPRD is a know presynaptic protein (see ticket #2248). It is shown to mediate cell-cell adhesion with NGL-3 in a cell-adhesion assay (Fig.7A+E). PTPRD expressed in HEKcells is able to cluster postsynaptic NGL-3 (Fig.7C). PTPRD is not able to induce postsynaptic differentiation (Fig.8).. Experimental description: EXPERIMENTAL PROCEDURES

Hippocampal Neuron Culture, Transfection, and Immunocytochemistry
Cultured hippocampal neurons were prepared from embryonic day 18 rat brain.

DNA Constructs and Antibodies
Full-length ectodomain of Rat NGL-3 (NGL-3-Ecto, XM_218615, aa 41-565), NGL-3-LRR (aa 40-377), and NGL-3-Ig (aa 365-458) were subcloned into pDisplay (Invitrogen). NGL-3-LRR (aa 1-373) and NGL-3-LRR-Q96A were subcloned into pEGFP-N1, in which EGFP was replaced with a human Fc domain. Point mutants of C-terminally EGFP-tagged NGL-3 (Q96A, K126A, D244A, H264A, D277A, K279A, and E282A) were subcloned to pEGFP-N1 (Clontech). The following deletion variants of LAR and LAR-related proteins were also subcloned into pDisplay; full-length ectodomain of human LAR (LAR-Ecto, Y00815, aa 17-1163), LAR-Ig1-3 (aa 35-295), LAR-FN1-8 (aa 309-1078), LAR-FN1-4 (aa 309-700), LAR-FN5-8 (aa 697-1078), LAR-FN1-2 (aa 309-504), LAR-FN3-4 (aa 498-700), LAR-FN1 (aa 309-420), LAR-FN2 (aa 399-520), human PTP-δ-Ecto (NM_002839, aa 21-1174), PTP-δ-FN1-2 (aa 323-518), human PTP-σ-Ecto (NM_130854, aa 30-1167), and PTP-σ-FN1-2 (aa 319-514).
